title: Introducing Agent Toolkit for AWS
summary: Agent Toolkit for AWS enables AI coding agents to interact with AWS services through up-to-date documentation, best practices, and tested procedures. The toolkit includes agent skills as markdown runbooks, plugins, and MCP configuration. It supports rapid deployment workflows like Lambda and API Gateway with auditability through CloudTrail.
